architecture.type: Layered web platform with backend services and frontend SPA

unique_features.name: AI bot operations layer
unique_features.description: The repository contains multiple AI-oriented bot and control surfaces across backend and frontend.

unique_features.name: Payment workflow platform
unique_features.description: The repository includes payment pages, gateway integrations, and webhook handlers.

unique_features.name: Partner portal capability
unique_features.description: Partner-facing portal pages and partner API routes are present.

unique_features.name: Training center subsystem
unique_features.description: A dedicated training-center and trainer-bot subsystem exists for structured training workflows.

unique_features.name: Real-time transport monitoring
unique_features.description: WebSocket and transport tracking modules indicate real-time monitoring features.

unique_features.name: Document intelligence workflow
unique_features.description: Document upload, OCR, and document dashboard code paths are present.

patent_claims.title: Multi-agent logistics operations orchestration
patent_claims.description: A system that coordinates specialized software agents across logistics workflows, including evidence of bot control surfaces and backend execution paths.

patent_claims.title: Integrated freight-payment workflow platform
patent_claims.description: A payment workflow combining customer-facing payment pages, gateway integrations, and asynchronous webhook processing for logistics operations.

patent_claims.title: Partner logistics portal with role-aware data access
patent_claims.description: A partner portal architecture that exposes partner-specific views, data retrieval paths, and settings management within a shared logistics platform.

patent_claims.title: AI or operator training workflow subsystem
patent_claims.description: A training-center subsystem that plans, tracks, and evaluates structured scenarios or learning paths within the platform.

patent_claims.title: Real-time transport visibility and alert delivery
patent_claims.description: A transport monitoring architecture using tracking and live communication modules to surface operational state changes in real time.

patent_claims.title: Automated logistics document processing pipeline
patent_claims.description: A document-processing flow with upload, parsing, OCR, and dashboard presentation layers for operational documents.

recommendations: Add an evidence map linking each claim candidate to exact code references and screenshots.
Document runtime architecture, deployment topology, and environment boundaries.
Add automated tests for the most material API and payment workflows.
Prepare a concise patentability memo distinguishing implementation evidence from aspirational roadmap items.
Create a public-facing product capability summary that matches the codebase reality.
certification_readiness.disclaimer: This score is evidence-based but heuristic. It is not a formal legal, patent, or certification opinion.
